args.query: SELECT book_id, title, rating_number, categories FROM books_info WHERE store = 'Amazon' AND (categories ILIKE '%Literature & Fiction%' OR categories ILIKE '%Literature & Fiction%') AND details ILIKE '%English%';

args.query: SELECT book_id, title, rating_number, categories, details, store FROM books_info;

exec_args.sql: SELECT book_id, title, rating_number, categories, details, store FROM books_info;

args.code:
import json, pandas as pd
# load full books_info result
with open(var_call_ITftcHyBJhuHrG99yWIlaQ84, 'r') as f:
    books = json.load(f)
reviews = var_call_zdu1rqxy2eyzoQAVeWBQpOZC
books_df = pd.DataFrame(books)
reviews_df = pd.DataFrame(reviews)
# filter Literature & Fiction and English in details
mask_lit = books_df['categories'].str.contains('Literature & Fiction', case=False, na=False)
mask_eng = books_df['details'].str.contains('English', case=False, na=False)
filtered_books = books_df[mask_lit & mask_eng]
# join on book_id == purchase_id
merged = pd.merge(filtered_books, reviews_df, left_on='book_id', right_on='purchase_id', how='inner')
result = merged[['book_id','title','rating_number','categories']].to_dict(orient='records')
out = json.dumps(result)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(out)

val_args.code:
import json, pandas as pd
# load full books_info result
with open(var_call_ITftcHyBJhuHrG99yWIlaQ84, 'r') as f:
    books = json.load(f)
reviews = var_call_zdu1rqxy2eyzoQAVeWBQpOZC
books_df = pd.DataFrame(books)
reviews_df = pd.DataFrame(reviews)
# filter Literature & Fiction and English in details
mask_lit = books_df['categories'].str.contains('Literature & Fiction', case=False, na=False)
mask_eng = books_df['details'].str.contains('English', case=False, na=False)
filtered_books = books_df[mask_lit & mask_eng]
# join on book_id == purchase_id
merged = pd.merge(filtered_books, reviews_df, left_on='book_id', right_on='purchase_id', how='inner')
result = merged[['book_id','title','rating_number','categories']].to_dict(orient='records')
out = json.dumps(result)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(out)
